description: Legal fragment. In Judaeo-Arabic. In the handwriting of Shemuel b. Saʿadya? Involves Sitthūm, the mother of Abū l-Maḥāsin. A blank has been left for the name of Sitthum's father. On verso there is a fragment of a different legal document, in a different hand, mentioning 9 dinars. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
